stemHtml: An under-confident and unassuming First Officer is promoted to Captain. Such a person could exhibit a behavioural pattern which is..

options.a: marked by moments of self-doubt, occasionally leading to depression.
options.b: influenced by the new role and publicly exhibits respect and competence.
options.c: characterised by an outward show of aggression and self-assertiveness.
options.d: successfully altered by the training programme’s focus on leadership qualities.
